category_sources: Official Martin docs and GitHub README describe a vector tile server, tile generation, and MBTiles tooling; source_facts.description matches this.
display_name_sources: Official documentation title is Martin Tile Server Documentation; source_facts.name is martin.
docs_sources: Official MapLibre Martin docs provide quick start, installation, CLI/configuration, usage, and API documentation; source_facts.homepage is martin.maplibre.org.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/maplibre/martin, so repo is intentionally returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes PostGIS, MBTiles, PMTiles, tile serving/generation, and related CLI tools; source_facts.executables lists martin, martin-cp, and mbtiles.
